basic_details.job_title: BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for 726 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bihar Technical Service Commission (BTSC) has released the official notification for Instructor Recruitment 2026, inviting online applications for 726 Instructor posts across various trades. This recruitment offers a great opportunity for candidates with Graduate, Diploma, and ITI qualifications to secure a government job in Bihar.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 15-04-2026 Last Date for Apply Online: 15-05-2026 Fee Payment Last Date: 15 May 2026

application_fee.details: All Candidates (All Category): Rs.100/- Payment Mode: Credit Card / Debit Card / Net Banking

age_limit.details: For Male (General / EWS): 21- 37 Years For Female (General): 21- 40 Years For Male/Female (OBC / EBC): 21- 40 Years For Male/Female (SC / ST): 21- 42 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: Instructor (Various Trade): | Must have completed Related Trade Course (1 or 2 years) from a recognized institute Institute must be approved by: NCVT (National Council for Vocational Training), New Delhi OR SCVT (State Council for Vocational Training), Patna | Instructor (Electrician/Wireman): | Must have completed Electrician/Wireman Trade Course (1 or 2 years) Institute must be approved by: NCVT OR SCVT | Instructor (Electrician) | Must have passed Matriculation (10th Class) or equivalent Must have completed ITI Training in: Electrician Trade OR Wireman Trade Must possess Apprenticeship Training Certificate in relevant trade | Preference: | Candidates with regular course training in the respective trade will be given preference

selection_process: Written Exam Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Visit Official Website
Open the official website of Bihar Technical Service Commission: btsc.bihar.gov.in or the BTSC online application portal btsc.pariksha.nic.in.
Click on the “Recruitment / Online Application” or “Apply Online” link for Advt. No. 14/2026 to 22/2026 – Instructor Posts.
New Registration
Click on “New Registration”.
Enter basic details (name, mobile number, email ID, date of birth, category etc.) and submit to generate your Registration ID and password.
Note/save the Registration ID and password for future logins.
Fill Online Application Form
Login using your Registration ID and password.

Select the relevant advertisement number and Instructor trade you wish to apply for (Survey, Machinist, Automobile Engineering, Leather Technology, Welder, Mechanic Tractor, Agriculture & Machinery, Fitter, Electronics Mechanic / Mechanic Radio & TV, Electrician/Wireman).
Fill all required details carefully: personal information, address, educational qualifications (Graduate/Diploma/ITI), experience (if applicable) and reservation details.
Upload Documents
Upload scanned copies of the following in the prescribed format and size (as mentioned in the notification):
Recent passport size photograph
Signature
Educational qualification certificates (Graduate/Diploma/ITI)
Category/caste certificate (if applicable)
Domicile, disability, and other relevant certificates if required.
Pay Application Fee
Proceed to the payment section and pay the application fee through online mode (debit card, credit card, net banking, UPI), as per your category, once the fee details are notified.
After successful payment, your application will be marked as “Fee Paid / Completed”.
Final Submit Application
Re‑check all the details filled in the form.
Click on “Final Submit” to submit the application form.
Take a printout/PDF of the final submitted application form and payment receipt for future reference (written exam, document verification etc.).
Important Instructions
Apply only through online mode; no offline form will be accepted.
Complete your application and fee payment before 15-05-2026 to avoid last‑minute issues.
Keep your registered mobile number and email ID active for all BTSC communication (exam date, admit card, updates).

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 726 vacancies have been notified for Instructor posts across various trades (Survey, Machinist, Automobile, Leather, Welder, Mechanic Tractor, Agriculture & Machinery, Fitter, Electronics Mechanic/Radio & TV, Electrician/Wireman) under BTSC Advertisement Nos. 14/2026 to 23/2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the online application dates for BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 15 April 2026 and will remain open until 15 May 2026 on the official BTSC portal btsc.bihar.gov.in / btsc.pariksha.nic.in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary or pay scale for BTSC Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: BTSC Instructors are placed in Pay Level‑6 with a pay scale of Rs. 9,300–34,800 plus Grade Pay Rs. 4,200 as per 7th CPC

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per detailed notices, the minimum age is 21 years and maximum 37 years for General/EWS male candidates as on 01‑08‑2026, with upper limits of 40 years for General female/OBC/EBC and 42 years for SC/ST; the notice mentions 18–37 years, so candidates should follow the detailed advertisement for category‑wise relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Degree or Diploma in the relevant engineering/technical discipline or a National Trade Certificate (ITI) in the related trade from a recognised institution; trade‑wise specific qualifications are given in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. How are the 726 BTSC Instructor vacancies distributed trade‑wise?
faq.answer: As per the notice, key trades include 84 posts for Instructor (Survey), 82 for Machinist, 84 for Welder, 84 for Fitter, 130 for Electronics Mechanic/Mechanic Radio & TV, 252 for Electrician/Wireman/Electrician and small numbers (1–4) for Automobile, Leather Technology, Mechanic Tractor and Agriculture & Machinery.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BTSC Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a Written Examination followed by Document Verification and Medical Examination; a final merit list will be prepared on the basis of written exam marks and eligibility verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for BTSC Instructor 2026 and how is it paid?
faq.answer: As per detailed online form notice, all category candidates are required to pay Rs. 100 as application fee through online mode (credit card, debit card, net banking, etc.), and the fee is non‑refundable.
